name: ai_bridge_core
desc: Core models, interfaces, and utilities for Flutter AI Bridge.

name: AIAttachment
desc: An attachment that can be sent with a message.

name: AIAttachment.imageBytes
desc: Creates an image attachment from bytes.

name: AIAttachment.imageUrl
desc: Creates an image attachment from a URL.

name: bytes
desc: Raw bytes of the attachment (for in-memory data).

name: filePath
desc: File path (for local files).

name: mimeType
desc: MIME type of the attachment.

name: name
desc: Display name for the attachment.

name: type
desc: The type of this attachment.

name: url
desc: URL of the attachment (for remote resources).

name: AIAttachmentType
desc: The type of content in an attachment.

name: values
desc: A constant List of the values in this enum, in order of their declaration.

name: AIAudioProvider
desc: Core interface for Audio capabilities.

name: speechToText
desc: Transcribes spoken audio bytes into text.

name: textToSpeech
desc: Synthesizes spoken audio from text.

name: AIAuthError
desc: Authentication error — invalid or expired API key.

name: isRetryable
desc: Whether this error is retryable.

name: AIBridge
desc: The main entry point for Flutter AI Bridge.

name: budget
desc: Optional token budget for cost control.

name: cache
desc: Optional response cache.

name: complete
desc: Sends a simple text completion request.

name: completeMessages
desc: Sends a completion request with full message history.

name: completeStream
desc: Sends a streaming completion request.

name: createConversationManager
desc: Creates a new conversation.

name: dispose
desc: Releases all resources.

name: primaryProvider
desc: The primary (first) provider.

name: providers
desc: The list of registered providers.

name: retryHandler
desc: Retry handler for transient failures.

name: router
desc: The smart router handling provider selection.

name: tokenTracker
desc: Token usage tracker.

name: AIBudgetExceededError
desc: Budget/quota exceeded.

name: isRetryable
desc: Whether this error is retryable.

name: AICapability
desc: Capabilities that an AI provider may support.

name: values
desc: A constant List of the values in this enum, in order of their declaration.

name: AICompletionProvider
desc: Core interface for AI text completion.

name: complete
desc: Sends a completion request and returns the full response.

name: config
desc: The configuration for this provider.

name: dispose
desc: Releases any resources held by this provider.

name: model
desc: The current model being used.

name: name
desc: Human-readable name of this provider.

name: AIConfig
desc: Configuration for an AI provider.

name: apiKey
desc: API key for the provider.

name: baseUrl
desc: Optional base URL override for the API.

name: copyWith
desc: Creates a copy with modified fields.

name: extraParams
desc: Additional provider-specific parameters.

name: kDefaultMaxAttachmentBytes
desc: Default maximum attachment size: 20 MB.

name: maxAttachmentBytes
desc: Maximum total bytes for attachments in a single request to prevent OOM or 413 Payload Too Large.

name: maxTokens
desc: Maximum tokens to generate in the response.

name: model
desc: The model to use (e.g., 'gpt-4o', 'gemini-2.0-flash').

name: systemPrompt
desc: System prompt to use by default.

name: temperature
desc: Temperature for response randomness (0.0 = deterministic, 2.0 = creative).

name: timeout
desc: Request timeout duration.

name: topP
desc: Top-p (nucleus sampling) parameter.

name: AIContentFilterError
desc: Content was filtered by safety settings.

name: category
desc: The safety category that was triggered.

name: isRetryable
desc: Whether this error is retryable.

name: AIDocument
desc: A chunk of textual data, usually parsed from a larger document.

name: content
desc: The specific chunk of text.

name: embedding
desc: Optional embedding vector representing the text.

name: metadata
desc: Optional metadata associated with this chunk (e.g., source file, page number).

name: similarityTo
desc: Calculates cosine similarity between this document's embedding and a query.

name: AIEmbeddingProvider
desc: Abstract interface for providers that support text embeddings.

name: embed
desc: Generates embeddings for the given text.

name: AIError
desc: Base class for all AI Bridge errors.

name: isRetryable
desc: Whether this error is retryable.

name: message
desc: Human-readable error message.

name: originalError
desc: Original error/exception from the provider (if available).

name: provider
desc: Which provider threw this error.

name: toString
desc: A string representation of this object.

name: AIMessage
desc: A single message in an AI conversation.

name: AIMessage.assistant
desc: Creates an assistant message (optionally with tool calls).

name: AIMessage.system
desc: Creates a system message.

name: AIMessage.toolResult
desc: Creates a tool result message.

name: AIMessage.user
desc: Creates a user message.

name: attachments
desc: Optional attachments (images, audio, files).

name: content
desc: The text content of the message.

name: copyWith
desc: Creates a copy with modified fields.

name: id
desc: Unique identifier for this message.

name: metadata
desc: Optional metadata for provider-specific data.

name: role
desc: The role of the sender.

name: timestamp
desc: When the message was created.

name: toString
desc: A string representation of this object.

name: toolCallId
desc: For 'tool' role: the specific ID of the tool call this message answers.

name: toolCalls
desc: For 'assistant' role: a list of tool invocations requested by the model.

name: AIModelNotFoundError
desc: Model not found or not available.

name: isRetryable
desc: Whether this error is retryable.

name: requestedModel
desc: The model that was requested.

name: AINetworkError
desc: Network error — connection issues, timeouts.

name: isRetryable
desc: Whether this error is retryable.

name: statusCode
desc: HTTP status code (if available).

name: AIProvider
desc: Full-featured AI provider interface.

name: capabilities
desc: List of capabilities this provider supports.

name: dispose
desc: Releases any resources held by this provider.

name: embed
desc: Generates embeddings for the given text.

name: estimateTokens
desc: Estimates the number of tokens in the given text.

name: kApproxCharsPerToken
desc: Approximate characters per token for rough estimation.

name: supports
desc: Whether this provider supports a specific capability.

name: AIRateLimitError
desc: Rate limit exceeded — too many requests.

name: isRetryable
desc: Whether this error is retryable.

name: retryAfter
desc: How long to wait before retrying (if provided by the API).

name: AIRequest
desc: A request to an AI provider.

name: configOverride
desc: Override configuration for this specific request.

name: maxTokens
desc: Maximum tokens for this request.

name: messages
desc: The messages to send (conversation history).

name: stream
desc: Whether to stream the response.

name: temperature
desc: Temperature for this request.

name: AIResponse
desc: A unified response from any AI provider.

name: content
desc: The generated text content.

name: finishReason
desc: The finish reason (e.g., 'stop', 'length', 'content_filter').

name: latency
desc: How long the request took.

name: metadata
desc: Provider-specific metadata.

name: model
desc: The model that generated this response.

name: provider
desc: The provider that served this response.

name: timestamp
desc: When the response was received.

name: toString
desc: A string representation of this object.

name: toolCalls
desc: Tool invocations requested by the model.

name: usage
desc: Token usage information.

name: AIRole
desc: Represents a role in an AI conversation.

name: values
desc: A constant List of the values in this enum, in order of their declaration.

name: AIRouter
desc: Smart router that decides which AI provider handles each request.

name: AIRouter.new
desc: Creates a router with a RoutingStrategyHandler.

name: providers
desc: Available providers to route to.

name: route
desc: Routes a completion request to the best available provider.

name: routeStream
desc: Routes a streaming request to the best available provider.

name: strategyHandler
desc: The strategy handler for provider selection.

name: AIServerError
desc: Server error from the provider (5xx).

name: isRetryable
desc: Whether this error is retryable.

name: statusCode
desc: HTTP status code.

name: AIStreamChunk
desc: A single chunk from a streaming AI response.

name: finishReason
desc: The finish reason (only on the final chunk).

name: isComplete
desc: Whether this is the final chunk.

name: model
desc: The model used.

name: provider
desc: The provider that generated this chunk.

name: text
desc: The text content of this chunk.

name: toString
desc: A string representation of this object.

name: toolCalls
desc: Tool invocations requested by the model.

name: usage
desc: Cumulative usage (only available on the final chunk).

name: AIStreamingProvider
desc: Interface for providers that support streaming responses.

name: completeStream
desc: Sends a completion request and returns a stream of chunks.

name: AITokenOverflowError
desc: Token limit exceeded — input or output too long.

name: isRetryable
desc: Whether this error is retryable.

name: maxTokens
desc: Maximum tokens allowed.

name: requestedTokens
desc: Tokens that were requested/used.

name: AITool
desc: Defines a tool or function that the AI can call.

name: description
desc: A description of what the function does.

name: execute
desc: The Dart function to execute when the AI invokes this tool.

name: name
desc:
The name of the function to be called.
Must contain only a-z, A-Z, 0-9, or underscores.

name: parameters
desc: JSON schema defining the parameters the function accepts.

name: AIToolCall
desc: Represents a specific invocation of a tool requested by the AI.

name: arguments
desc: The JSON-formatted arguments provided by the AI.

name: id
desc: Unique identifier for this specific tool call (required by OpenAI).

name: name
desc: The name of the tool to be called.

name: props
desc:
The list of properties that will be used to determine whether
two instances are equal.

name: AIUnknownError
desc: Unknown/unclassified error.

name: isRetryable
desc: Whether this error is retryable.

name: AIUsage
desc: Token usage information from an AI response.

name: completionTokens
desc: Number of tokens in the generated response.

name: estimatedCostUsd
desc: Estimated cost in USD (if available).

name: promptTokens
desc: Number of tokens in the input/prompt.

name: props
desc:
The list of properties that will be used to determine whether
two instances are equal.

name: toString
desc: A string representation of this object.

name: totalTokens
desc: Total tokens used (prompt + completion).

name: zero
desc: Zero usage (for cases where usage is not tracked).

name: CancellationToken
desc: A token that allows cancellation of in-flight AI requests.

name: cancel
desc: Cancel the associated operation.

name: isCancelled
desc: Whether cancellation has been requested.

name: throwIfCancelled
desc: Throws CancelledException if cancellation has been requested.

name: CancelledException
desc: Exception thrown when an operation is cancelled via CancellationToken.

name: toString
desc: A string representation of this object.

name: CircuitBreaker
desc: Circuit breaker pattern to prevent cascading failures.

name: execute
desc: Executes action through the circuit breaker.

name: failureThreshold
desc: Number of failures before opening the circuit.

name: isAllowed
desc: Whether requests are currently allowed through.

name: name
desc: Name of this circuit (typically the provider name).

name: recordFailure
desc: Records a failed request.

name: recordSuccess
desc: Records a successful request.

name: reset
desc: Resets the circuit breaker to closed state.

name: resetTimeout
desc: How long to keep the circuit open before testing again.

name: state
desc: Current state of the circuit.

name: CircuitState
desc: States the circuit breaker can be in.

name: values
desc: A constant List of the values in this enum, in order of their declaration.

name: Conversation
desc: Represents a conversation with an AI provider.

name: activeMessages
desc: Returns messages suitable for sending to an AI provider.

name: addMessage
desc: Adds a message to the conversation.

name: createdAt
desc: When the conversation was created.

name: id
desc: Unique identifier for this conversation.

name: isEmpty
desc: Whether the conversation is empty (no user/assistant messages).

name: messageCount
desc: Number of messages in the conversation.

name: messages
desc: Read-only view of the messages in this conversation.

name: metadata
desc: Optional metadata.

name: systemMessage
desc: Returns the system prompt if one exists.

name: title
desc: Optional title for the conversation.

name: toString
desc: A string representation of this object.

name: totalTokensUsed
desc: Total tokens used in this conversation.

name: updatedAt
desc: When the conversation was last updated.

name: ConversationManager
desc: Manages conversations with AI providers.

name: all
desc: Returns all active conversations.

name: clearAll
desc: Clears all conversations from memory (but not storage).

name: create
desc: Creates a new conversation with an optional system prompt.

name: delete
desc: Deletes a conversation from memory and storage.

name: get
desc: Gets a conversation by ID from memory.

name: load
desc: Asynchronously loads a conversation from storage.

name: loadAll
desc: Asynchronously loads all conversations from storage into memory.

name: maxContextTokens
desc: Maximum tokens to keep in context window.

name: maxToolIterations
desc: Maximum recursive tool call iterations before aborting.

name: provider
desc: The AI provider to use for completions.

name: send
desc: Sends a message in a conversation and returns the response.

name: sendStream
desc: Sends a message in a conversation and returns a stream of chunks.

name: storage
desc: Optional storage provider for saving and loading conversations automatically.

name: tokenTracker
desc: Token tracker for monitoring usage.

name: CostOptimizedStrategy
desc: Selects providers by estimated cost-per-token (cheapest first).

name: selectProviders
desc: Orders the available providers based on this strategy's logic.

name: DocumentChunker
desc: Splits long text into manageable chunks for vector embeddings.

name: chunkOverlap
desc: The number of overlapping characters between consecutive chunks.

name: chunkSize
desc: The maximum size of each chunk (in characters).

name: splitText
desc: Splits a single string of text into multiple AIDocument chunks.

name: FallbackChain
desc: Executes a request through a chain of providers with automatic fallback.

name: circuitBreakers
desc: Circuit breakers for health tracking.

name: execute
desc: Executes action with automatic fallback to the next provider on failure.

name: providers
desc: Ordered list of providers to try.

name: InMemoryVectorStore
desc: A simple, local, list-backed Vector Store.

name: addDocuments
desc:
Adds documents to the store.
Implementation should compute embeddings if the document doesn't have them yet.

name: clear
desc: Deletes all documents in this store.

name: documents
desc: Returns all currently stored documents.

name: embedder
desc: The provider used to generate text embeddings.

name: similaritySearch
desc: Searches for the most similar documents to the given query.

name: LatencyOptimizedStrategy
desc: Selects providers with the lowest average latency first.

name: selectProviders
desc: Orders the available providers based on this strategy's logic.

name: OnChunkCallback
desc: Callback for each received chunk.

name: OnCompleteCallback
desc: Callback when streaming completes.

name: OnStreamErrorCallback
desc: Callback for stream errors.

name: PrimaryStrategy
desc: Uses the first available provider (insertion order).

name: selectProviders
desc: Orders the available providers based on this strategy's logic.

name: QualityFirstStrategy
desc: Selects providers in reverse insertion order (assumed quality order).

name: selectProviders
desc: Orders the available providers based on this strategy's logic.

name: ResponseCache
desc: Caches AI responses to reduce redundant API calls and costs.

name: clear
desc: Clears all cached entries.

name: evictExpired
desc: Removes expired entries.

name: get
desc: Attempts to retrieve a cached response for the given key.

name: keyFromMessages
desc: Generates a cache key from a list of message contents.

name: maxEntries
desc: Maximum number of entries to cache.

name: put
desc: Stores a response in the cache with the given key.

name: size
desc: Number of entries currently cached.

name: ttl
desc: Time-to-live for cached entries.

name: RetryHandler
desc: Handles automatic retries for retryable AI errors.

name: baseDelay
desc: Base delay between retries.

name: execute
desc: Executes action with automatic retries on retryable errors.

name: maxDelay
desc: Maximum delay between retries.

name: maxRetries
desc: Maximum number of retry attempts.

name: RoundRobinStrategy
desc: Round-robin rotation across providers.

name: selectProviders
desc: Orders the available providers based on this strategy's logic.

name: RoutingStrategy
desc: Strategy for routing requests to providers.

name: values
desc: A constant List of the values in this enum, in order of their declaration.

name: RoutingStrategyExtension
desc: Extension for backward compatibility: convert enum to handler.

name: RoutingStrategyHandler
desc: Abstract interface for routing strategy implementations.

name: selectProviders
desc: Orders the available providers based on this strategy's logic.

name: StorageProvider
desc: An abstract interface for storing and retrieving conversations.

name: deleteConversation
desc: Deletes a conversation by its unique ID.

name: dispose
desc: Closes any open resources or database connections.

name: loadAllConversations
desc:
Loads all available conversations.
Returns an empty list if none exist.

name: loadConversation
desc:
Loads a conversation by its unique ID.
Returns null if not found.

name: saveConversation
desc: Saves a conversation to storage.

name: StreamHandler
desc: Manages streaming AI responses with unified handling.

name: accumulate
desc: Converts a stream of chunks into a stream of accumulated text.

name: process
desc: Processes a stream of chunks and returns the accumulated text.

name: timeout
desc: Timeout for the entire stream.

name: TokenBudget
desc: Controls token spending with configurable budgets.

name: canProceed
desc: Checks whether a request with estimatedTokens can proceed.

name: dailyRemaining
desc: Remaining tokens in the daily budget (null if unlimited).

name: dailyTokensUsed
desc: Tokens used today.

name: enforce
desc: Enforces the budget — throws AIBudgetExceededError if over budget.

name: maxTokensPerDay
desc: Maximum tokens per day.

name: maxTokensPerRequest
desc: Maximum tokens per single request.

name: maxTokensPerSession
desc: Maximum tokens per session (resets when resetSession is called).

name: recordUsage
desc: Records token usage from a completed response.

name: resetAll
desc: Resets all budgets.

name: resetSession
desc: Resets the session budget.

name: sessionRemaining
desc: Remaining tokens in the session budget (null if unlimited).

name: sessionTokensUsed
desc: Tokens used in the current session.

name: TokenTracker
desc: Tracks token usage across requests and sessions.

name: record
desc: Records usage from a response.

name: requestCount
desc: Number of requests made.

name: reset
desc: Resets all tracked data.

name: toString
desc: A string representation of this object.

name: totalCompletionTokens
desc: Total completion tokens used across all requests.

name: totalCostUsd
desc: Total estimated cost in USD.

name: totalPromptTokens
desc: Total prompt tokens used across all requests.

name: totalTokens
desc: Total tokens used (prompt + completion).

name: ToolExecutionLoop
desc: Handles the autonomous tool execution loop.

name: execute
desc: Processes a conversation, executing tool calls recursively until done.

name: maxIterations
desc: Maximum iterations before aborting.

name: provider
desc: The AI provider to use for completions.

name: VectorStore
desc: Abstract interface for a Vector Database/Store used in RAG.

name: addDocuments
desc:
Adds documents to the store.
Implementation should compute embeddings if the document doesn't have them yet.

name: clear
desc: Deletes all documents in this store.

name: similaritySearch
desc: Searches for the most similar documents to the given query.
